zh.Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, F: 德國薩辛可萊斯 德利其格洛其格洛其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia於1159年9月13日出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 德利其格洛其時，他的父親Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste32歲，母親Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg29歲。他和Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1210年5月6日在德國布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特巴德 利本維爾達勞希次享年50歲，埋葬在德國薩辛可萊斯 洛利次維瑟爾包格。

nameMeanings.name: Conrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English spelling of Konrad, a Germanic personal name derived from kuon ‘bold’ + rad ‘counsel’. It was used occasionally in Britain in the Middle Ages in honour of a 10th-century bishop of Constance, but modern use in the English-speaking world is a reimportation from Germany dating mainly from the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia was born on 13 September 1159, in Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Saxony, Germany, his father, Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste, was 32 and his mother, Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia. He died on 6 May 1210, in Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 50, and was buried in Wechselburg, Rochlitz, Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia est né le 13 septembre 1159, à Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1210, à Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Wechselburg, Kreis Rochlitz, Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia am 13. September 1159 in Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste 32 und seine Mutter Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg 29. Er hatte mit Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1210 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Deutschland und wurde in Wechselburg, Kreis Rochlitz, Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia è nato il il 13 settembre 1159 nel Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia. Morì il 6 maggio 1210, nel Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germania, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Wechselburg, Kreis Rochlitz, Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Conrad II Margrave of Lusatiaが1159年9月13日にドイツサチセンクレイス デリトズッシュグロイトズッシュで生まれた時，父Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feisteは32歳，母Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsbergは29歳であった。彼はElzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemiaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1210年5月6日にドイツブランデンブルグランドクレイス エルベ-エルスターバド リーベンウエルダラウシッツで50歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンクレイス ロチリッツウエチセルブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, F: 독일 작센 크레이스 데리츠슈 그로이츠슈 그로이츠슈
ko.lifeSummary: Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia(이)가 1159년 9월 13일 독일 작센 크레이스 데리츠슈 그로이츠슈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1210년 5월 6일 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 엘브-스터 바드 리벤워다 로짓즈에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센 크레이스 록h리츠 w크셀버그에 묻혔다.

pt.13 September 1159–6 May 1210: 13 de setembro de 1159–6 de maio de 1210
pt.Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Elbe-Elster, B: Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemanha
pt.Lausitz, Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germa: Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemanha
pt.Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, F: Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia nasceu em 13 de setembro de 1159, em Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1210, em Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Wechselburg, Kreis Rochlitz, Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Elbe-Elster, B: лаусиц, бад лиебенвирда, ландкрис элбе-елстир, брэнденбург, Германия

ru.Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, F: гроицщ, гроицщ, крис делицщ, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia родился 13 сентября 1159 г. в местности гроицщ, крис делицщ, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia. Он умер 6 мая 1210 г. в местности лаусиц, бад лиебенвирда, ландкрис элбе-елстир, брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности вечселбург, крис рочлиц, сачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conrad II Margrave of Lusatia nació el 13 de septiembre de 1159, en Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Markgraf Dedo III von Wettin der Feiste, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gräfin Mechthild von Heinsberg, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1210, en Lausitz, Bad Liebenwerda, Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Wechselburg, Kreis Rochlitz, Sachsen, Alemania.
